summary: First-finish smoke tests for Scout MVP. Backend (trending, places, filters, 404, analyze fresh+cached, empty validation, bar analyze) all pass. Frontend home, trending cards, category chips, hero search redirect to /analyze?q=, nav testids, place detail page (sentiment-bar, video-source-0), and full Analyze flow (Bar Basso -> loading-kinetic -> /place/{id}) all pass with no errors.
passed: GET /api/trending returns 6 curated places sorted by sentiment_score desc; all required fields present
GET /api/places auto-seeds and returns curated set (8 curated + 1 analyzed = 9 total in DB)
GET /api/places?q=chai matches Jew Town Chai Wallah
POST /api/analyze Katz Delicatessen: valid Place, sentiment=9.1, confidence=97, 3 pros/cons/must_try, 3 videos, tags array (~8s)
POST /api/analyze The Aviary bar: valid Place with sentiment=9.1, confidence=95, 3 videos
Home / loads, hero-search-input and hero-search-submit present
HeroSearch: 'Ronin' + submit navigates to /analyze?q=Ronin with analyze-name-input prefilled 'Ronin'
Clicking a place card navigates to /place/{id}; place-detail-page, sentiment-bar, video-source-0 all present
Analyze flow: filled Bar Basso/Milan/bar -> submit shows loading-kinetic -> navigates to /place/{new-id} with detail page
No .error or [class*=error] messages visible on page

failed.issue: Exact-string locator for hero headline 'The best places, verified by every food creator alive.' returned 0 matches (likely split across DOM nodes / animated per-word rendering). Visual headline appears rendered correctly in Home page.
